            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "            \u003cdiv class=\"more-info\"\u003e{{ profile.more_info }}\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "          {% endif %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "        \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "        \u003cdiv class=\"clearfix\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "          {% if profile.content %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "            {% capture profile_content %}{% include_relative {{ profile.content }} %}{% endcapture %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "            {{ profile_content | markdownify }}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "          {% else %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "            {{ content }}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "          {% endif %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "        \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "      {% endfor %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "    {% endif %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "  \u003c/article\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "---\r\nlayout: page\r\n---\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"post\"\u003e\r\n  \u003carticle\u003e\r\n    {% if page.profiles %}\r\n      {% for profile in page.profiles %}\r\n        \u003chr\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"profile float-{% if profile.align == 'left' %}left{% else %}right{% endif %}\"\u003e\r\n          {% if profile.image %}\r\n            {% assign profile_image_path = profile.image | prepend: 'assets/img/' %}\r\n            {% if profile.image_circular %}\r\n              {% assign profile_image_class = 'img-fluid z-depth-1 rounded-circle' %}\r\n            {% else %}\r\n              {% assign profile_image_class = 'img-fluid z-depth-1 rounded' %}\r\n            {% endif %}\r\n            {% capture sizes %}(min-width: {{ site.max_width }}) {{ site.max_width | minus: 30 | times: 0.3}}px, (min-width: 576px) 30vw, 95vw\"{% endcapture %}\r\n            {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=profile_image_path class=profile_image_class sizes=sizes alt=profile.image %}\r\n          {% endif %}\r\n          {% if profile.more_info %}\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"more-info\"\u003e{{ profile.more_info }}\u003c/div\u003e\r\n          {% endif %}\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"clearfix\"\u003e\r\n          {% if profile.content %}\r\n            {% capture profile_content %}{% include_relative {{ profile.content }} %}{% endcapture %}\r\n            {{ profile_content | markdownify }}\r\n          {% else %}\r\n            {{ content }}\r\n          {% endif %}\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n      {% endfor %}\r\n    {% endif %}\r\n  \u003c/article\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 36
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "_layouts/profiles.liquid"
      },
      "score": 0.4118692874908447

      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "---\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "layout: post\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "title: a post with images\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "date: 2015-05-15 21:01:00\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "description: this is what included images could look like\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "tags: formatting images\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "categories: sample-posts\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "thumbnail: assets/img/9.jpg\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "---\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "This is an example post with image galleries.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"row mt-3\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/9.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/7.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"caption\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    A simple, elegant caption looks good between image rows, after each row, or doesn't have to be there at all.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "Images can be made zoomable.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "Simply add &#96;data-zoomable&#96; to &#96;\u003cimg\u003e&#96; tags that you want to make zoomable.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"row mt-3\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/8.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" zoomable=true %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/10.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" zoomable=true %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "The rest of the images in this post are all zoomable, arranged into different mini-galleries.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"row mt-3\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "        {% include figure.liquid path=\"assets/img/11.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" zoomable=true %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,

          },
          {

            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "---\r\nlayout: post\r\ntitle: a post with images\r\ndate: 2015-05-15 21:01:00\r\ndescription: this is what included images could look like\r\ntags: formatting images\r\ncategories: sample-posts\r\nthumbnail: assets/img/9.jpg\r\n---\r\n\r\nThis is an example post with image galleries.\r\n\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"row mt-3\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/9.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/7.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"caption\"\u003e\r\n    A simple, elegant caption looks good between image rows, after each row, or doesn't have to be there at all.\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\nImages can be made zoomable.\r\nSimply add &#96;data-zoomable&#96; to &#96;\u003cimg\u003e&#96; tags that you want to make zoomable.\r\n\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"row mt-3\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/8.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" zoomable=true %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/10.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" zoomable=true %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\nThe rest of the images in this post are all zoomable, arranged into different mini-galleries.\r\n\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"row mt-3\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid path=\"assets/img/11.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" zoomable=true %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid path=\"assets/img/12.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" zoomable=true %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid path=\"assets/img/7.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" zoomable=true %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n",

            "text": "---\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "layout: post\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "title: a post with advanced image components\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "date: 2024-01-27 11:46:00\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "description: this is what advanced image components could look like\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "tags: formatting images\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "categories: sample-posts\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "thumbnail: assets/img/9.jpg\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "images:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "  compare: true\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "  slider: true\r"

            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "---\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "This is an example post with advanced image components.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "## Image Slider\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "This is a simple image slider. It uses the [Swiper](https://swiperjs.com/) library. Check the [examples page](https://swiperjs.com/demos) for more information of what you can achieve with it.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\u003cswiper-container keyboard=\"true\" navigation=\"true\" pagination=\"true\" pagination-clickable=\"true\" pagination-dynamic-bullets=\"true\" rewind=\"true\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "  \u003cswiper-slide\u003e{% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/9.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\u003c/swiper-slide\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "  \u003cswiper-slide\u003e{% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/7.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\u003c/swiper-slide\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "  \u003cswiper-slide\u003e{% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/8.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\u003c/swiper-slide\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "  \u003cswiper-slide\u003e{% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/10.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\u003c/swiper-slide\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "  \u003cswiper-slide\u003e{% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/12.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\u003c/swiper-slide\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "\u003c/swiper-container\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "## Image Comparison Slider\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "This is a simple image comparison slider. It uses the [img-comparison-slider](https://img-comparison-slider.sneas.io/) library. Check the [examples page](https://img-comparison-slider.sneas.io/examples.html) for more information of what you can achieve with it.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\u003cimg-comparison-slider\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "  {% include figure.liquid path=\"assets/img/prof_pic.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" slot=\"first\" %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "  {% include figure.liquid path=\"assets/img/prof_pic_color.png\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" slot=\"second\" %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\u003c/img-comparison-slider\u003e\r"
          }
        ],

          {
            "lineNumber": 353,
            "text": "    {% if entry.bibtex_show %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 354,
            "text": "      \u003c!-- Hidden bibtex block --\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 355,
            "text": "      \u003cdiv class=\"bibtex hidden\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 356,
            "text": "        {% highlight bibtex %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 357,
            "text": "        {{- entry.bibtex | hideCustomBibtex -}}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 358,
            "text": "        {% endhighlight %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 359,
            "text": "      \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 360,
            "text": "    {% endif %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 361,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 362,
            "text": "    {% if entry.video and site.enable_video_embedding %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 363,
            "text": "      \u003c!-- Hidden video block --\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 364,
            "text": "      \u003cdiv class=\"abstract hidden\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 365,
            "text": "        \u003cdiv style=\"text-align: center;\"\u003e{% include video.liquid path=entry.video class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" controls=true %}\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 366,
            "text": "      \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 367,
            "text": "    {% endif %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 368,
            "text": "  \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 369,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "          {% if site.enable_publication_badges.inspirehep and entry_has_inspirehep_badge %}\r\n            \u003ca\r\n              href=\"https://inspirehep.net/literature/{{ entry.inspirehep_id }}\"\r\n              aria-label=\"Inspirehep link\"\r\n              role=\"button\"\r\n            \u003e\r\n              \u003cimg\r\n                src=\"https://img.shields.io/badge/inspire-{% inspirehep_citations entry.inspirehep_id %}-001628?logo=inspire\u0026logoColor=001628\u0026labelColor=beige\"\r\n                alt=\"{% inspirehep_citations entry.inspirehep_id %} InspireHEP citations\"\r\n              \u003e\r\n            \u003c/a\u003e\r\n          {% endif %}\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n      {% endif %}\r\n    {% endif %}\r\n\r\n    {% if entry.award %}\r\n      \u003c!-- Hidden Award block --\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"award hidden d-print-inline\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cp\u003e{{ entry.award | markdownify }}\u003c/p\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    {% endif %}\r\n\r\n    {% if entry.abstract %}\r\n      \u003c!-- Hidden abstract block --\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"abstract hidden\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cp\u003e{{ entry.abstract }}\u003c/p\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    {% endif %}\r\n\r\n    {% if entry.bibtex_show %}\r\n      \u003c!-- Hidden bibtex block --\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"bibtex hidden\"\u003e\r\n        {% highlight bibtex %}\r\n        {{- entry.bibtex | hideCustomBibtex -}}\r\n        {% endhighlight %}\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    {% endif %}\r\n\r\n    {% if entry.video and site.enable_video_embedding %}\r\n      \u003c!-- Hidden video block --\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"abstract hidden\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv style=\"text-align: center;\"\u003e{% include video.liquid path=entry.video class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" controls=true %}\u003c/div\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    {% endif %}\r\n  \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "---\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "layout: page\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "title: SkyDrive\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "description: SkyDrive is a multi-agent human-in-the-loop, digital-twin-enabled traffic simulator.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "img: assets/img/fig1.svg\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "importance: 1\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "category: UW-Madison\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "related_publications: true\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "---\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "Every project has a beautiful feature showcase page.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "It's easy to include images in a flexible 3-column grid format.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "Make your photos 1/3, 2/3, or full width.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "To give your project a background in the portfolio page, just add the img tag to the front matter like so:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    ---\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    layout: page\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "    title: project\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "    description: a project with a background image\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "    img: /assets/img/12.jpg\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    ---\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/1.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/3.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/5.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"caption\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    Caption photos easily. On the left, a road goes through a tunnel. Middle, leaves artistically fall in a hipster photoshoot. Right, in another hipster photoshoot, a lumberjack grasps a handful of pine needles.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/5.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"caption\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "    This image can also have a caption. It's like magic.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "You can also put regular text between your rows of images, even citations {% cite einstein1950meaning %}.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "Say you wanted to write a bit about your project before you posted the rest of the images.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "You describe how you toiled, sweated, _bled_ for your project, and then... you reveal its glory in the next row of images.\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "---\r\nlayout: page\r\ntitle: SkyDrive\r\ndescription: SkyDrive is a multi-agent human-in-the-loop, digital-twin-enabled traffic simulator.\r\nimg: assets/img/fig1.svg\r\nimportance: 1\r\ncategory: UW-Madison\r\nrelated_publications: true\r\n---\r\n\r\nEvery project has a beautiful feature showcase page.\r\nIt's easy to include images in a flexible 3-column grid format.\r\nMake your photos 1/3, 2/3, or full width.\r\n\r\nTo give your project a background in the portfolio page, just add the img tag to the front matter like so:\r\n\r\n    ---\r\n    layout: page\r\n    title: project\r\n    description: a project with a background image\r\n    img: /assets/img/12.jpg\r\n    ---\r\n\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/1.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/3.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/5.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"caption\"\u003e\r\n    Caption photos easily. On the left, a road goes through a tunnel. Middle, leaves artistically fall in a hipster photoshoot. Right, in another hipster photoshoot, a lumberjack grasps a handful of pine needles.\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/5.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"caption\"\u003e\r\n    This image can also have a caption. It's like magic.\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\nYou can also put regular text between your rows of images, even citations {% cite einstein1950meaning %}.\r\nSay you wanted to write a bit about your project before you posted the rest of the images.\r\n",

            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r"

          {

            "text": "            {% endif -%}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "          \u003e\r"
          },

          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "            {% else %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "              \u003cdiv\u003e{{- entry.abbr -}}\u003c/div\u003e\r"

          },
          {

            "text": "        {% else %}\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "          \u003cabbr class=\"badge rounded w-100\"\u003e{{ entry.abbr }}\u003c/abbr\u003e\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "        {% endif %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "      {% endif %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "      {% if entry.preview %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "        {% if entry.preview contains '://' %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "          \u003cimg class=\"preview z-depth-1 rounded\" src=\"{{ entry.preview }}\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "        {% else %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "          {% assign entry_path = entry.preview | prepend: '/assets/img/publication_preview/' %}\r"

          {

          {

          {

            "text": "            class=\"preview z-depth-1 rounded\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "            zoomable=true\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "            alt=entry.preview\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "          %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "        {% endif %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "      {% endif %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "  {% endif %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "  \u003c!-- Entry bib key --\u003e\r"
          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

        "originalContents": "---\r\n---\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r\n  {% if site.enable_publication_thumbnails %}\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col col-sm-2 abbr\"\u003e\r\n      {%- if entry.abbr             "text": "---\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "layout: page\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "title: project 6\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "description: a project with no image\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "img:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "importance: 4\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "category: fun\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "---\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "Every project has a beautiful feature showcase page.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "It's easy to include images in a flexible 3-column grid format.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "Make your photos 1/3, 2/3, or full width.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "To give your project a background in the portfolio page, just add the img tag to the front matter like so:\r"

            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    ---\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    layout: page\r"
          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 32,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"caption\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    Caption photos easily. On the left, a road goes through a tunnel. Middle, leaves artistically fall in a hipster photoshoot. Right, in another hipster photoshoot, a lumberjack grasps a handful of pine needles.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/5.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r"
          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"caption\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "    This image can also have a caption. It's like magic.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "You can also put regular text between your rows of images.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "Say you wanted to write a little bit about your project before you posted the rest of the images.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "You describe how you toiled, sweated, _bled_ for your project, and then... you reveal its glory in the next row of images.\r"

        "originalContents": "---\r\nlayout: page\r\ntitle: project 6\r\ndescription: a project with no image\r\nimg:\r\nimportance: 4\r\ncategory: fun\r\n---\r\n\r\nEvery project has a beautiful feature showcase page.\r\nIt's easy to include images in a flexible 3-column grid format.\r\nMake your photos 1/3, 2/3, or full width.\r\n\r\nTo give your project a background in the portfolio page, just add the img tag to the front matter like so:\r\n\r\n    ---\r\n    layout: page\r\n    title: project\r\n    description: a project with a background image\r\n    img: /assets/img/12.jpg\r\n    ---\r\n\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/1.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/3.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/5.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"caption\"\u003e\r\n    Caption photos easily. On the left, a road goes through a tunnel. Middle, leaves artistically fall in a hipster photoshoot. Right, in another hipster photoshoot, a lumberjack grasps a handful of pine needles.\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/5.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"caption\"\u003e\r\n    This image can also have a caption. It's like magic.\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\nYou can also put regular text between your rows of images.\r\nSay you wanted to write a little bit about your project before you posted the rest of the images.\r\nYou describe how you toiled, sweated, _bled_ for your project, and then... you reveal its glory in the next row of images.\r\n\r\n",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    Caption photos easily. On the left, a road goes through a tunnel. Middle, leaves artistically fall in a hipster photoshoot. Right, in another hipster photoshoot, a lumberjack grasps a handful of pine needles.\r"

          {

            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "You can also put regular text between your rows of images.\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 47,

        "originalContents": "---\r\nlayout: page\r\ntitle: project 4\r\ndescription: another without an image\r\nimg:\r\nimportance: 3\r\ncategory: fun\r\n---\r\n\r\nEvery project has a beautiful feature showcase page.\r\nIt's easy to include images in a flexible 3-column grid format.\r\nMake your photos 1/3, 2/3, or full width.\r\n\r\nTo give your project a background in the portfolio page, just add the img tag to the front matter like so:\r\n\r\n    ---\r\n    layout: page\r\n    title: project\r\n    description: a project with a background image\r\n    img: /assets/img/12.jpg\r\n    ---\r\n\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/1.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/3.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/5.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"caption\"\u003e\r\n    Caption photos easily.             "text": "  \u003ca href=\"{% if project.redirect %}{{ project.redirect }}{% else %}{{ project.url | relative_url }}{% endif %}\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"card h-100 hoverable\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "      \u003cdiv class=\"row no-gutters\"\u003e\r"

          {

            "text": "        {% if project.img %}\r"

          {

            "text": "            {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=project.img sizes=\"(min-width: 768px) 156px, 50vw\" alt=\"project thumbnail\" class=\"card-img\" %}\r"

          {

            "text": "          \u003c/div\u003e\r"

            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "        {% endif %}\r"

          {

            "text": "        \u003cdiv class=\"{% if project.img %}col-md-6{% else %}col-md-12{% endif %}\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "          \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "            \u003ch3 class=\"card-title\"\u003e{{ project.title }}\u003c/h3\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "            \u003cp class=\"card-text\"\u003e{{ project.description }}\u003c/p\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "            \u003cdiv class=\"row ml-1 mr-1 p-0\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "              {% if project.github %}\r"
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "                  \u003cdiv class=\"icon\" data-toggle=\"tooltip\" title=\"Code Repository\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,

          },
          {

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/5.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"caption\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    Caption photos easily. On the left, a road goes through a tunnel. Middle, leaves artistically fall in a hipster photoshoot. Right, in another hipster photoshoot, a lumberjack grasps a handful of pine needles.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,

          },

            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/5.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r"
          },

          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "    This image can also have a caption. It's like magic.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "You can also put regular text between your rows of images, even citations {% cite einstein1950meaning %}.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "Say you wanted to write a bit about your project before you posted the rest of the images.\r"

            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "You describe how you toiled, sweated, _bled_ for your project, and then... you reveal its glory in the next row of images.\r"

        "originalContents": "---\r\nlayout: page\r\ntitle: project 7\r\ndescription: with background image\r\nimg: assets/img/4.jpg\r\nimportance: 1\r\ncategory: work\r\nrelated_publications: true\r\n---\r\n\r\nEvery project has a beautiful feature showcase page.\r\nIt's easy to include images in a flexible 3-column grid format.\r\nMake your photos 1/3, 2/3, or full width.\r\n\r\nTo give your project a background in the portfolio page, just add the img tag to the front matter like so:\r\n\r\n    ---\r\n    layout: page\r\n    title: project\r\n    description: a project with a background image\r\n    img: /assets/img/12.jpg\r\n    ---\r\n\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/1.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/3.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/5.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"caption\"\u003e\r\n    Caption photos easily.             "text": "Say you wanted to write a little bit about your project before you posted the rest of the images.\r"

          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "Our goal is to establish an intelligent driving platform specifically for VTT, develop advanced control algorithms, significantly improve their control performance, ensure safe operation, and provide strong support for the development of urban public transportation in China. This work will also contribute to advancements in intelligent transportation systems. Please refer to our publications for more information. {% cite zhengyang2024vtt %}.\r\n\r\n\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/1.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/3.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/5.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"caption\"\u003e\r\n    Caption photos easily. On the left, a road goes through a tunnel. Middle, leaves artistically fall in a hipster photoshoot. Right, in another hipster photoshoot, a lumberjack grasps a handful of pine needles.\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/5.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"caption\"\u003e\r\n    This image can also have a caption.         "originalContents": "---\r\nlayout: page\r\ntitle: project 4\r\ndescription: another without an image\r\nimg:\r\nimportance: 3\r\ncategory: fun\r\n---\r\n\r\nEvery project has a beautiful feature showcase page.\r\nIt's easy to include images in a flexible 3-column grid format.\r\nMake your photos 1/3, 2/3, or full width.\r\n\r\nTo give your project a background in the portfolio page, just add the img tag to the front matter like so:\r\n\r\n    ---\r\n    layout: page\r\n    title: project\r\n    description: a project with a background image\r\n    img: /assets/img/12.jpg\r\n    ---\r\n\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/1.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/3.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/5.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"caption\"\u003e\r\n    Caption photos easily.           {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "This is an example post with advanced image components.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "## Image Slider\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "This is a simple image slider. It uses the [Swiper](https://swiperjs.com/) library. Check the [examples page](https://swiperjs.com/demos) for more information of what you can achieve with it.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\u003cswiper-container keyboard=\"true\" navigation=\"true\" pagination=\"true\" pagination-clickable=\"true\" pagination-dynamic-bullets=\"true\" rewind=\"true\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "  \u003cswiper-slide\u003e{% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/9.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\u003c/swiper-slide\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "  \u003cswiper-slide\u003e{% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/7.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\u003c/swiper-slide\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "  \u003cswiper-slide\u003e{% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/8.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\u003c/swiper-slide\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "  \u003cswiper-slide\u003e{% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/10.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\u003c/swiper-slide\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "  \u003cswiper-slide\u003e{% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/12.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\u003c/swiper-slide\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "\u003c/swiper-container\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "## Image Comparison Slider\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "This is a simple image comparison slider. It uses the [img-comparison-slider](https://img-comparison-slider.sneas.io/) library. Check the [examples page](https://img-comparison-slider.sneas.io/examples.html) for more information of what you can achieve with it.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\u003cimg-comparison-slider\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "  {% include figure.liquid path=\"assets/img/prof_pic.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" slot=\"first\" %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "  {% include figure.liquid path=\"assets/img/prof_pic_color.png\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" slot=\"second\" %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\u003c/img-comparison-slider\u003e\r"
          }
        ],

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "This is an example post with image galleries.\r"

            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"row mt-3\"\u003e\r"

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"caption\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    A simple, elegant caption looks good between image rows, after each row, or doesn't have to be there at all.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "Images can be made zoomable.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "Simply add &#96;data-zoomable&#96; to &#96;\u003cimg\u003e&#96; tags that you want to make zoomable.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"row mt-3\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/8.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" zoomable=true %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/10.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" zoomable=true %}\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "The rest of the images in this post are all zoomable, arranged into different mini-galleries.\r"
          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,

        "originalContents": "---\r\nlayout: post\r\ntitle: a post with images\r\ndate: 2015-05-15 21:01:00\r\ndescription: this is what included images could look like\r\ntags: formatting images\r\ncategories: sample-posts\r\nthumbnail: assets/img/9.jpg\r\n---\r\n\r\nThis is an example post with image galleries.\r\n\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"row mt-3\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/9.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/7.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"caption\"\u003e\r\n    A simple, elegant caption looks good between image rows, after each row, or doesn't have to be there at all.\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\nImages can be made zoomable.\r\nSimply add &#96;data-zoomable&#96; to &#96;\u003cimg\u003e&#96; tags that you want to make zoomable.\r\n\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"row mt-3\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/8.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" zoomable=true %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/10.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" zoomable=true %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\nThe rest of the images in this post are all zoomable, arranged into different mini-galleries.\r\n\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"row mt-3\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid path=\"assets/img/11.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" zoomable=true %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid path=\"assets/img/12.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" zoomable=true %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid path=\"assets/img/7.jpg\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" zoomable=true %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "---\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "layout: page\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "---\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"post\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "  \u003carticle\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "    {% if page.profiles %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "      {% for profile in page.profiles %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "        \u003chr\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "        \u003cdiv class=\"profile float-{% if profile.align == 'left' %}left{% else %}right{% endif %}\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "          {% if profile.image %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "            {% assign profile_image_path = profile.image | prepend: 'assets/img/' %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "            {% if profile.image_circular %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "              {% assign profile_image_class = 'img-fluid z-depth-1 rounded-circle' %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "            {% else %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "              {% assign profile_image_class = 'img-fluid z-depth-1 rounded' %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "            {% endif %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "            {% capture sizes %}(min-width: {{ site.max_width }}) {{ site.max_width | minus: 30 | times: 0.3}}px, (min-width: 576px) 30vw, 95vw\"{% endcapture %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "            {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=profile_image_path class=profile_image_class sizes=sizes alt=profile.image %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "          {% endif %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "          {% if profile.more_info %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "            \u003cdiv class=\"more-info\"\u003e{{ profile.more_info }}\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "          {% endif %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "        \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "        \u003cdiv class=\"clearfix\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "          {% if profile.content %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "            {% capture profile_content %}{% include_relative {{ profile.content }} %}{% endcapture %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "            {{ profile_content | markdownify }}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "          {% else %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "            {{ content }}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "          {% endif %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "        \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "      {% endfor %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "    {% endif %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "  \u003c/article\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "---\r\nlayout: page\r\n---\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"post\"\u003e\r\n  \u003carticle\u003e\r\n    {% if page.profiles %}\r\n      {% for profile in page.profiles %}\r\n        \u003chr\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"profile float-{% if profile.align == 'left' %}left{% else %}right{% endif %}\"\u003e\r\n          {% if profile.image %}\r\n            {% assign profile_image_path = profile.image | prepend: 'assets/img/' %}\r\n            {% if profile.image_circular %}\r\n              {% assign profile_image_class = 'img-fluid z-depth-1 rounded-circle' %}\r\n            {% else %}\r\n              {% assign profile_image_class = 'img-fluid z-depth-1 rounded' %}\r\n            {% endif %}\r\n            {% capture sizes %}(min-width: {{ site.max_width }}) {{ site.max_width | minus: 30 | times: 0.3}}px, (min-width: 576px) 30vw, 95vw\"{% endcapture %}\r\n            {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=profile_image_path class=profile_image_class sizes=sizes alt=profile.image %}\r\n          {% endif %}\r\n          {% if profile.more_info %}\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"more-info\"\u003e{{ profile.more_info }}\u003c/div\u003e\r\n          {% endif %}\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"clearfix\"\u003e\r\n          {% if profile.content %}\r\n            {% capture profile_content %}{% include_relative {{ profile.content }} %}{% endcapture %}\r\n            {{ profile_content | markdownify }}\r\n          {% else %}\r\n            {{ content }}\r\n          {% endif %}\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n      {% endfor %}\r\n    {% endif %}\r\n  \u003c/article\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 36
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "_layouts/profiles.liquid"
      },
      "score": 0.3298160433769226
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "{% assign img_path = include.path | remove: '.jpg' | remove: '.jpeg' | remove: '.png' | remove: '.tiff' | remove: '.gif' %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "{% assign parts = include.path | split: '.' %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "{% assign ext = parts.last %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\u003cfigure\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "  {% if include.slot %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "    slot=\"{{ include.slot }}\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "  {% endif %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "  \u003cpicture\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    \u003c!-- Auto scaling with imagemagick --\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    \u003c!--\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "      See https://www.debugbear.com/blog/responsive-images#w-descriptors-and-the-sizes-attribute and\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "      https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Learn/HTML/Multimedia_and_embedding/Responsive_images for info on defining 'sizes' for responsive images\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    --\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    {% if site.imagemagick.enabled %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "      \u003csource\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "        class=\"responsive-img-srcset\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        {% if ext == 'gif' or ext == 'jpeg' or ext == 'jpg' or ext == 'png' or ext == 'tiff' %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "          srcset=\"{% for i in site.imagemagick.widths %}{{ img_path | relative_url }}-{{ i }}.webp {{ i }}w,{% endfor %}\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "          type=\"image/webp\"\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "        {% else %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "          srcset=\"{{ include.path | relative_url }}\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "        {% endif %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "        {% if include.sizes %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "          sizes=\"{{ include.sizes }}\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "        {% else %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "          sizes=\"95vw\"\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 29,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "    {% endif %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "    \u003cimg\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "      src=\"{% if include.url %}{{ include.url }}{% elsif include.cache_bust %}{{ include.path | relative_url | bust_file_cache }}{% else %}{{ include.path | relative_url }}{% endif %}\"\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "{% assign img_path = include.path | remove: '.jpg' | remove: '.jpeg' | remove: '.png' | remove: '.tiff' | remove: '.gif' %}\r\n{% assign parts = include.path | split: '.' %}\r\n{% assign ext = parts.last %}\r\n\r\n\u003cfigure\r\n  {% if include.slot %}\r\n    slot=\"{{ include.slot }}\"\r\n  {% endif %}\r\n\u003e\r\n  \u003cpicture\u003e\r\n    \u003c!-- Auto scaling with imagemagick --\u003e\r\n    \u003c!--\r\n      See https://www.debugbear.com/blog/responsive-images#w-descriptors-and-the-sizes-attribute and\r\n      https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Learn/HTML/Multimedia_and_embedding/Responsive_images for info on defining 'sizes' for responsive images\r\n    --\u003e\r\n    {% if site.imagemagick.enabled %}\r\n      \u003csource\r\n        class=\"responsive-img-srcset\"\r\n        {% if ext == 'gif' or ext == 'jpeg' or ext == 'jpg' or ext == 'png' or ext == 'tiff' %}\r\n          srcset=\"{% for i in site.imagemagick.widths %}{{ img_path | relative_url }}-{{ i }}.webp {{ i }}w,{% endfor %}\"\r\n          type=\"image/webp\"\r\n        {% else %}\r\n          srcset=\"{{ include.path | relative_url }}\"\r\n        {% endif %}\r\n        {% if include.sizes %}\r\n          sizes=\"{{ include.sizes }}\"\r\n        {% else %}\r\n          sizes=\"95vw\"\r\n        {% endif %}\r\n      \u003e\r\n    {% endif %}\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 33
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "_includes/figure.liquid"
      },
      "score": 0.32850366830825806

      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "---\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "layout: page\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "title: Study of VRUs\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "description: a project that redirects to another website\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "img: assets/img/VRU.png\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "redirect: https://unsplash.com\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "importance: 2\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "category: UW-Madison\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "---\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "Every project has a beautiful feature showcase page.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "It's easy to include images in a flexible 3-column grid format.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "Make your photos 1/3, 2/3, or full width.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "To give your project a background in the portfolio page, just add the img tag to the front matter like so:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    ---\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    layout: page\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "    title: project\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "    description: a project with a background image\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "    img: /assets/img/12.jpg\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    ---\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/1.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/3.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/5.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"caption\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    Caption photos easily. On the left, a road goes through a tunnel. Middle, leaves artistically fall in a hipster photoshoot. Right, in another hipster photoshoot, a lumberjack grasps a handful of pine needles.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/5.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"caption\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "    This image can also have a caption. It's like magic.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "You can also put regular text between your rows of images.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "Say you wanted to write a little bit about your project before you posted the rest of the images.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "You describe how you toiled, sweated, _bled_ for your project, and then... you reveal its glory in the next row of images.\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "---\r\nlayout: page\r\ntitle: Study of VRUs\r\ndescription: a project that redirects to another website\r\nimg: assets/img/VRU.png\r\nredirect: https://unsplash.com\r\nimportance: 2\r\ncategory: UW-Madison\r\n---\r\n\r\nEvery project has a beautiful feature showcase page.\r\nIt's easy to include images in a flexible 3-column grid format.\r\nMake your photos 1/3, 2/3, or full width.\r\n\r\nTo give your project a background in the portfolio page, just add the img tag to the front matter like so:\r\n\r\n    ---\r\n    layout: page\r\n    title: project\r\n    description: a project with a background image\r\n    img: /assets/img/12.jpg\r\n    ---\r\n\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/1.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/3.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/5.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"caption\"\u003e\r\n    Caption photos easily. On the left, a road goes through a tunnel. Middle, leaves artistically fall in a hipster photoshoot. Right, in another hipster photoshoot, a lumberjack grasps a handful of pine needles.\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/5.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"caption\"\u003e\r\n    This image can also have a caption.         "originalContents": "---\r\nlayout: page\r\ntitle: project 9\r\ndescription: another project with an image 🎉\r\nimg: assets/img/6.jpg\r\nimportance: 4\r\ncategory: fun\r\n---\r\n\r\nEvery project has a beautiful feature showcase page.\r\nIt's easy to include images in a flexible 3-column grid format.\r\nMake your photos 1/3, 2/3, or full width.\r\n\r\nTo give your project a background in the portfolio page, just add the img tag to the front matter like so:\r\n\r\n    ---\r\n    layout: page\r\n    title: project\r\n    description: a project with a background image\r\n    img: /assets/img/12.jpg\r\n    ---\r\n\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/1.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/3.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r\n        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/5.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"caption\"\u003e\r\n    Caption photos easily.             "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "Hello there!🤺\r"
