          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "I am a first-year **Ph.D. student** in the Department of Civil and Environmental Engineering (CEE) at the \u003cimg src=\"../assets/img/uwmadison.png\" width=\"14\" height=\"22\" style=\"vertical-align: middle; margin: 0 2px;\"/\u003e[University of Wisconsin-Madison](https://www.wisc.edu/) (UW-Madison). I joined \u003cimg src=\"../assets/img/skylab.png\" width=\"33\" height=\"22\" style=\"vertical-align: middle; margin: 0 2px;\"/\u003e[Sky-Lab](https://sky-lab-uw.github.io/) at UW-Madison in Fall 2025 under the guidance of Dr.[Sikai (Sky) Chen](https://sky-lab-uw.github.io/people/). On Wisconsin!\u003cimg src=\"../assets/img/bucky.png\" width=\"15\" height=\"22\" style=\"vertical-align: middle; margin: 0 2px;\"/\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "Before joining UW-Madison, I obtained my M.S. in Transportation Engineering at [College of Transportation](https://tjjt.tongji.edu.cn/), \u003cimg src=\"../assets/img/tongji.png\" width=\"22\" height=\"22\" style=\"vertical-align: middle; margin: 0 2px;\"/\u003eTongji University in 2025, and my B.E. in Vehicle Engineering at [Institute of Rail Transit](https://railway.tongji.edu.cn/main.htm), Tongji University in 2022. I am very fortunate and honored to be advised by Prof. [Hechao Zhou](https://tjjt.tongji.edu.cn/info/2943/10933.htm) and Prof. [Jimin Zhang](https://railway.tongji.edu.cn/c5/e6/c4609a50662/page.htm) during my study at Tongji University. 🫶\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "As for now, I am working to accelerate the development of future intelligent transportation technologies. 🧐 Specifically, I focus on:\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "---\r\nlayout: about\r\ntitle: About\r\npermalink: /\r\nsubtitle: \u003cspan class=\"highlight-text\"\u003e Ph.D. student \u003c/span\u003eat The University of Wisconsin-Madison CEE\r\n\r\n\r\nprofile:\r\n  align: right\r\n  image: DSCF1344.webp\r\n  image_circular: false # crops the image to make it circular\r\n  more_info: \u003e\r\n    \u003cp style=\"margin-left: 35px;\"\u003eChicago, US, 2025\u003c/p\u003e\r\n\r\nnews: true # includes a list of news items\r\nselected_papers: true # includes a list of papers marked as \"selected={true}\"\r\nsocial: true # includes social icons at the bottom of the page\r\n---\r\nHello there!🤺\r\n\r\nI am a first-year **Ph.D. student** in the Department of Civil and Environmental Engineering (CEE) at the \u003cimg src=\"../assets/img/uwmadison.png\" width=\"14\" height=\"22\" style=\"vertical-align: middle; margin: 0 2px;\"/\u003e[University of Wisconsin-Madison](https://www.wisc.edu/) (UW-Madison).           },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "Every project has a beautiful feature showcase page.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "It's easy to include images in a flexible 3-column grid format.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "Make your photos 1/3, 2/3, or full width.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "To give your project a background in the portfolio page, just add the img tag to the front matter like so:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    ---\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 18,

          },

            "text": "    ---\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r"

          },
          {

            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"

          {

            "text": "        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/5.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    Caption photos easily. On the left, a road goes through a tunnel. Middle, leaves artistically fall in a hipster photoshoot. Right, in another hipster photoshoot, a lumberjack grasps a handful of pine needles.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"col-sm mt-3 mt-md-0\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "        {% include figure.liquid loading=\"eager\" path=\"assets/img/5.jpg\" title=\"example image\" class=\"img-fluid rounded z-depth-1\" %}\r"

            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"caption\"\u003e\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "    This image can also have a caption. It's like magic.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "You can also put regular text between your rows of images.\r"
          },

            "text": "Say you wanted to write a little bit about your project before you posted the rest of the images.\r"

_**Agent (default)**_

已修复。已用 `{::nomarkdown}` 和 `{:/nomarkdown}` 包裹所有 img 标签。

**问题原因：**
当 HTML 标签（如 `<img>`）与 Markdown 链接语法相邻时，kramdown 可能误解析，导致出现反引号等意外字符。

**解决方案：**
使用 kramdown 的 `{::nomarkdown}` 扩展，让解析器跳过这些 HTML 标签的处理，直接输出，避免误解析。

现在所有 img 标签都被正确包裹，不会再出现反引号问题。渲染效果保持不变，但不会被 Markdown 解析器误处理。

如果之后添加新的 img 标签，记得也用 `{::nomarkdown}...{:/nomarkdown}` 包裹它们。
